criticalPatientsSubtitle: Level I - Resuscitation patients in queue
diagnosisPlaceholder: E.g.: J18.9 - Unspecified pneumonia, R50.9 - Fever
emergencyDescription: Patient at vital risk or decompensation. Requires priority evaluation.
emergencyDirectAttentionSubtitle: Priority I — Triage can be completed during care.
emergencyNote: Minimum data for emergency. Profile can be completed later.
errorMovingPatientToAttentionQueue: Could not send the patient to the attention queue
extensionExplainer: Here are some colored boxes. Because they are attached as extensions within a slot, an admin can change what boxes are shown using configuration. These boxes happen to be defined in this module, but they could attach to this slot even if they were in a different module.
getStartedExplainer: Create a frontend module from this template
initialPriorityDescription: Detailed priority is assigned during triage.
learnExplainer: Learn how to use the O3 framework
moveErrorGeneric: An error occurred while moving the queue entry
moveSuccessMessage: The patient has been moved to {{queue}}
nationalityCatalogUnavailable: The nationality catalog could not be loaded
noVisitFound: No active visit found for this patient
cannotMovePatientWithoutVisit: The patient cannot be moved to attention without an active visit.
patientAddedToQueueSubtitle: The patient has been registered and sent to the triage queue with status "Pending triage".
patientHasActiveVisit: The patient already has an active visit
patientMovedToAttentionQueueWithPriority: Patient sent to attention with priority {{priority}}
patientQueuedSuccess: Paciente enviado a cola de triaje
patientQueuedSuccessSubtitle: El paciente ha sido registrado y enviado a la cola de triaje.
patientServedSuccessfully: Patient has been marked as in service
patientsWaitingTriageSubtitle: Assign triage level to proceed with treatment
pleaseSelectPriority: Please select a priority before continuing.
priorityIDescription: Patient whose clinical condition may put their life, vital function, or organ at imminent risk.
priorityIIDescription: Patient at risk of complication or decompensation of the current illness or injury.
priorityIIIDescription: Patient with an acute condition, without current vital risk, who needs same-day care.
priorityIIITooltip: Patients without risk of death or disabling sequelae. They require attention in the Emergency Topic Area, with Priority I and II cases taking precedence.
priorityIITooltip: Patients with a sudden, acute condition at risk of death or serious complications, requiring attention within 10 minutes of admission. They will be treated in Emergency Consultation Rooms.
priorityITooltip: Patients with sudden and critical health deterioration, at imminent risk of death, requiring immediate attention in the Resuscitation Room - Shock Trauma.
priorityIVDescription: Patient with a chronic condition, without evidence of recent deterioration, who needs care.
priorityIVTooltip: Patients without compromise of vital functions or risk of immediate complications, who can be treated in Outpatient Clinics or Decentralized Consultation Rooms.
prioritySelectionInfo: Select the priority level based on the patient's initial assessment. This will determine the order of care.
rangeValidationWarningDetail: Some values are outside the allowed range for this patient. Check the marked fields.
searchOrRegisterDescription: Search for an existing patient or register a new one to send them to the triage queue.
selectedQueueHasNoAllowedPriorities: The selected queue has no configured allowed priorities.
sessionExpiredError: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
transitionErrorGeneric: An error occurred while transitioning the entry
transitionSuccessMessage: Queue entry has been transitioned successfully
triageCompletedSuccessfully: Patient has been triaged and sent to the attention queue
triageErrorGeneric: An error occurred while completing triage
triageIncompleteMessage: Vitals were saved, but required data is missing to assign priority and send the patient to attention.
unknownWarning: It will be registered as UNKNOWN. It can be updated later.
urgencyDescription: Patient without immediate vital risk. Will be evaluated at triage.
usefulLinks: Below are some links to useful resources
valueAboveAbsolute: Value {{value}} is outside the allowed range (max: {{max}} {{units}})
valueBelowAbsolute: Value {{value}} is outside the allowed range (min: {{min}} {{units}})
